response.original_title: El último combate de las tropas del gobierno con los revolucionarios de don Orestes Ferro: Los sucesos de Piura y el combate del río Chira
response.overview: Tomorrow, a film premieres at this theater, the result of the audacity of the cameraman from the Olimpo, who was stationed in Piura after the attack on Catacaos by the revolutionaries led by Mr. Orestes Ferro. The film includes the departure of troops to Piura, the battle, the capture of ten revolutionaries, the return of the kidnapped merchants, Messrs. Mendoza and Calle, their reception in Piura after their rescue, and the guerrillas Messrs. Plata, Castillo, and another. Mr. Castillo is shown with a bullet through his chest and back, a wound he received in the battle of Poechos. The film is over 350 meters long and, as you can see, it is very interesting, being one of the few and only ones in Peru that has been taken in such circumstances.
response.title: El último combate de las tropas del gobierno con los revolucionarios de don Orestes Ferro: Los sucesos de Piura y el combate del río Chira
